data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of pass/fail determination per item, but the evidence provided does not confirm this requirement comprehensively. While there is a mention of a failed inspection for the lights on the forklift, there is no evidence of a complete pass/fail determination for all required checkpoints (tires, brakes, lights, horn) as specified in the use case. This indicates a gap in the evidence needed to fully satisfy the requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the completion of all required checkpoints (tires, brakes, lights, horn) as per the requirement.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the pass/fail determination for each inspection checkpoint.
